name: Dual Avatar Ascendance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Dual Avatar" monster you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Dual Avatar" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck, whose original Level is 1 higher or 1 lower than that monster had on the field. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Dual Avatar" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Dual Avatar Ascendance" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Dual Avatar" monster you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Dual Avatar" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck, whose original Level is 1 higher or 1 lower than that monster had on the field. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Dual Avatar" monster in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Dual Avatar Ascendance" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
